description: Demo paraphrase sets (10 facts, 5 paraphrases each) generated from baselines/paraphrase_sets_50.json.

paraphrases: Aspirin may cause gastric bleeding in some patients.

Aspirin can lead to bleeding in the stomach.

paraphrase_sets.fact: Metformin is used to treat type 2 diabetes.

Metformin helps control blood sugar in type 2 diabetes.

paraphrase_sets.fact: Warfarin increases the risk of bleeding.
